title: Metronome
description: The first time you [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]7[/blue] [gold]Orbs[/gold] each combat, deal [blue]30[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: The relic displays a counter showing how many Orbs have been channeled. It becomes highlighted (Active status) when one Orb away from triggering. The counter and trigger reset at the end of each combat.
